## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] Ran locally without errors
- [ ] Updated README/docs if needed
- [ ] No secrets/tokens committed

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused scope (no unrelated changes)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Screenshots/logs attached if UI behavior changed
